name: Gemma 4 — describe a video (caption)
description:
Ask Gemma 4 (a vision-language model running in ComfyUI) to describe a video in words. Upload a clip and the model writes a description / caption as text — useful on its own, or to turn a video into a prompt for another workflow.

Edit the instruction to steer the output, e.g. "Describe the video." / "List what happens, step by step." / "Write a short caption." / "Describe the mood, motion and lighting." Change the seed to re-roll the wording.

Tip: keep clips short — every frame is read by the model, so long or high-resolution videos are slower and use more memory.
author: Template - ComfyUI
